theme: town meeting votes on public-works bundles
title: Town Meeting Logrolling: Referendum Bundle Partition
strategies: trivial: the checker's own internal baseline -- project 0 (the guaranteed-safe consensus project) alone in bundle 1, every other project lumped into bundle 2 -> ~0.1

greedy: sort all projects by descending welfare weight and load-balance them across the K bundles via classic LPT bin-packing; never reads a supporter/opposer index, so it fails to rediscover the planted polarizer+sweetener pairings and often sinks a good bundle by dropping a poison project into it

strong: exact voter-set algebra -- test every project alone, then for every solo-failing project search all other projects for an exact bundle-pass recheck (which union of supporter/opposer sets crosses the majority threshold), greedily match the highest-value flips within the bundle budget, and isolate unrescuable/poison projects so they never contaminate a passing bundle
invalid: assigns every project to bundle id K+1 (out of range) -> rejected, 0.0
